mapper.select: SELECT O.id, O.operate_emp_id AS operateEmpId, O.operate_time AS operateTime, O.method_name AS methodName, O.method_params AS methodParams, O.return_value AS returnValue, O.cost_time AS costTime, E.name AS operateEmpName FROM operate_log AS O LEFT JOIN emp AS E ON O.operate_emp_id = E.id ORDER BY O.operate_time DESC
